hooks.command: changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null); if echo "$changed" | grep -qE '^(src/|tests/|conftest\.py|config/|\.claude/|\.github/|pyproject\.toml|Makefile)'; then if ! echo "$changed" | grep -q 'CLAUDE_LOG\.md'; then echo '{"systemMessage": "WARNING: Repo files changed but CLAUDE_LOG.md was not updated. Add a log entry before finishing."}'; fi; fi
